# CLIENT-FOLLOWUP — Client / Prospect Follow-up

## When

Use for static sites, consulting, or client-facing fronts.

## Purpose

Move a client/prospect interaction forward with a small external action.

## Inputs

- Prospect/client thread
- Offer or demo
- Next proposed step
- Relevant link/artifact

## Steps minimum

1. Identify the next client action.
2. Write a short message.
3. Include demo/link/decision request if needed.
4. Send.
5. Log next pointer.

## Output

Client/prospect interaction advanced.

## Tick valid when

The client/prospect has received the next useful message or artifact.

## Stop rule

Do not redesign the full offer during a follow-up.
